content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the Neuman Brain project. I've reviewed the CLAUDE.md constitution and understand my role as lead autonomous engineer/architect.

Let me start by following the session protocol:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main 2>&1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<parameter name="type">read_only</parameter>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git merge origin/main --no-edit 2>&1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<parameter name="type">read_only</parameter>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git log -3 --oneline</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<parameter name="type">read_only</parameter>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && ls tasks/*.md 2>&1</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<parameter name="type">read_only</parameter>

Now I'm ready for your instructions. From the environment context, I can see:

**Current Status:**
- **Today's date:** 2025-11-29 (Friday)
- **Branch:** main
- **Recent work:** E2E test CI removal, browser matrix fixes
- **Outstanding:** Modified .claude/settings.local.json, several master-implementation-status files

What would you like me to work on today?
